message:
test(core): add batch render edge case tests for mux_client

Add comprehensive tests for mux_client batch_render_changes covering
boundary conditions and error handling:

- Zero pipeline depth clamping: verify pipeline_depth=0 is clamped to 1
  and still succeeds without panic
- Server disconnect mid-batch: verify client detects broken pipe and
  returns appropriate error when server drops connection during a
  multi-pane batch render
- Large batch handling: verify correct behavior with 100+ pane batch
  renders to catch any buffer overflow or protocol framing issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
